subject: Escalation: parrot blockers for Rome | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-3629
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Rome. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-3629. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
